'''Jandoon''' was a planet in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], in the [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sector]].
It eventually came to be known as a haunted world. It was home to the ancient ruins of a civilization that disappeared.

==History==
The residents of Jandoon [[Death/Legends|died]] around [[491 BBY]] and the cause of their disappearance was never solved. Rumors made the round that the festivals of the dead visited the [[Jandoon system/Legends|Jandoon system]] and therefore most of the travelers remained away from the planet. Another rumor told us that the residents of Jandoon were technologically advanced so that great machines were hidden deep in the planet.<ref name="R" />

Another rumor was that Jandoon was the home of the [[Brizzit]]. [[Tzizvvt]] said he was from Jandoon. Around [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] he was looking for a treasure in the Jandoon System for which he sought help at [[Solomahal/Legends|Solomahal]].<ref name="DB">{{DB|character|tzizvvt|Tzizvvt}}</ref>

It was home to the [[Jandoonian salamander]].<ref name="RPG" />
